author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

This PR speeds up `ModuleEventAllocMonitor` substantially. I measured with a RECO step of workflow 18434.0 with `ModuleEventAllocMonitor` configured to monitor all modules that
* Job wall time decreases by ~3.6x
* Loop wall time decreases by ~6.8x
* There is no noticeable increase in peak RSS or VSIZE (sampled at 1 second intervals)

The speedup is achieved by
* replacing sorted `std::vector` with `std::unordered_map`
   * the use case is "many insertions and erasures"
* replacing search doing a linear loop over per-module maps with a search in one `std::unordered_map` where the entries from all modules are aggregated into

This PR also adds a test for the `ModuleEventAllocMonitor` (using the test of `ModuleAllocMonitor` as a starting point).

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2010

#### PR validation:

Unit tests succeed. Testing locally on a RECO step of workflow 18434.0 does not show substantial differences in output of `edmModuleEventAllocMonitorAnalyze.py --product`.
title: Speed up ModuleEventAllocMonitor
